physicalBuild.toggleDesc: This shape has walls or overhangs where a piece could fall or roll out. Every piece must anchor at least one ball in the supported part of the shape — placements that would fall are blocked, and your finished solve is checked and saved in real-world assembly order.
physicalBuild.blocked: 🏗️ That piece would fall — anchor at least one ball in the supported part of the shape.
physicalBuild.notFreestanding: 🏗️ Heads-up: this shape can't be assembled freestanding with real pieces — it balances on too small a base. Build it in a cradle, or enjoy it digitally.
physicalBuild.buildable: Physically buildable — saved with a stable assembly order.
physicalBuild.unbuildable: This arrangement wouldn't stand with real pieces — some would fall while building. Try a different arrangement!
physicalBuild.reorientedNote: Tip: this shape is best built resting on a different face than shown — the checks and assembly order account for that.

tooltips.checkSolvabilityFull: Check if this position can still be solved

solveRated.title: Rated Solve
solveRated.rule2: Using hints places the piece but awards no point (net 0).
solveRated.rule4: Undo is restricted to last move only.
solveRated.strategy: Strategy: This mode is for competitive solving. Plan your moves carefully!

solveUnrated.title: Unrated Solve
solveUnrated.rule1: Hints and solvability checks are free.
solveUnrated.rule3: This mode is for exploration and learning.
solveUnrated.tip: Relax and explore: Experiment freely without pressure!

success.title: Congratulations!
success.subtitle: Puzzle Solved!
success.autoSaved: ✅ Your solution has been automatically saved!

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using KOOS Puzzle, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provisions of this agreement. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use this service.

license.title: 2. Use License
license.content: Permission is granted to temporarily use KOOS Puzzle for personal, non-commercial purposes. This license shall automatically terminate if you violate any of these restrictions and may be terminated by KOOS Puzzle at any time.

userContent.title: 3. User Content
userContent.content: Users may create and share puzzle designs and solutions. You retain ownership of your content but grant KOOS Puzzle a license to display and distribute your content within the platform. You are responsible for ensuring your content does not violate any laws or infringe on others' rights.

accountSecurity.title: 4. Account Security
accountSecurity.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.

privacy.title: 5. Privacy Policy
privacy.content: Your privacy is important to us. We collect minimal personal information necessary for account functionality. Your email address and puzzle data are stored securely and will not be shared with third parties without your consent.

disclaimer.title: 6. Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: KOOS Puzzle is provided "as is" without any warranties, expressed or implied. We do not warrant that the service will be uninterrupted, timely, secure, or error-free.

liability.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: In no event shall KOOS Puzzle be liable for any damages arising out of the use or inability to use the service, including but not limited to data loss or service interruptions.

modifications.title: 8. Modifications to Terms
modifications.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.

contact.title: 9. Contact Information
contact.content: For questions about these Terms & Conditions, please contact us through the support channels provided in the application.

emptyCells.title: Empty Cell Appearance
emptyCells.description: Control the appearance of neighbor cells (green spheres in add mode)
emptyCells.linkedMessage: Empty cells will match your environment material settings
emptyCells.customMessage: Empty cells use custom material settings below

presets.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this preset?

overview.title: Game Mode: Landmine
overview.description: Compete against the computer in turn-based puzzle assembly. Every move is final—don't make the puzzle unsolvable!

placingPiece.title: Your Turn
placingPiece.rule: – Place a piece: +1 point, turn passes to computer.

winLose.title: Win/Lose Conditions
winLose.lose: – You LOSE if your move makes the puzzle unsolvable.
winLose.draw: – DRAW if all pieces are placed and puzzle remains solvable.
winLose.noMoves: – Game ends when no more moves are possible.

noUndos.title: ⚠️ No Take-Backs
noUndos.rule: Once a piece is placed, it cannot be removed. Choose carefully!

goal.label: Goal:
goal.description: Keep the puzzle solvable and score points. Don't be the one who breaks it!

placing.title: Drawing & Placing:
placing.step1: 1. Click on an empty cell in the container to start drawing.
placing.step2: 2. Continue clicking adjacent cells to define the 4-cell shape.
placing.step3: 3. The system will automatically match your drawn shape to a valid piece and place it.

selecting.title: Viewing Pieces:
selecting.action: – Single-click on any placed piece to view it.

home.welcome: Welcome! Choose your path to explore the world of 3D sphere puzzles.
home.subtitle: Design puzzles. Find solutions. Challenge the world.

whatIs.title: What is KOOS Puzzle?
whatIs.description: A beautifully complex 3D puzzle where 25 tetrahedral pieces fit together in a face-centered cubic lattice. Simple to learn, endlessly challenging to master.

create.title: Create
create.description: Design your own unique puzzle shapes and share them with the world

solve.title: Solve
solve.description: Challenge yourself with puzzles from easy to mind-bendingly complex

compete.title: Compete
compete.description: Race against the clock or play head-to-head with friends

funFacts.title: Mind-Blowing Math
funFacts.fact1: More solutions than atoms in the universe
funFacts.fact3: Based on FCC crystal lattice geometry

solve.title: Solve a Puzzle
solve.description: Pick from the gallery and start solving today.

create.description: Design your own unique sphere puzzle.

whatIs.title: What is Koos Puzzle?
whatIs.description: Koos Puzzle is a 3D puzzle platform where you can solve challenging sphere-based puzzles, create your own designs, and share them with a global community.

features.title: Key Features
features.solve: Solve puzzles manually or watch automated solutions
features.create: Design and publish your own 3D sphere puzzles
features.auto: Powerful AI solver with multiple strategies
features.share: Save and share your creations with the community

comingSoon.title: Coming Soon!
comingSoon.message: We're working hard to bring you this feature!

welcome.title: Assembly Guide
welcome.subtitle: Step-by-step help to build the physical puzzle
welcome.purpose: This page helps you assemble your physical KOOS Puzzle by showing you exactly how pieces fit together.
welcome.feature1Description: Use the reveal slider to show pieces one at a time in the correct assembly order.
welcome.feature2Description: Use the explosion slider to separate pieces and see how they connect.
welcome.feature3Description: Click the info button to see puzzle details, statistics, and creator information.
welcome.feature4Description: Change lighting and environment presets to get the best view for assembly.
welcome.feature5Description: Double-click any piece in the puzzle to open a detailed 3D view of that piece.

welcome.title: Create Your Puzzle
welcome.subtitle: Design and share your own 3D puzzle
welcome.purpose: This page lets you build custom KOOS Puzzles by adding cells to create unique 3D shapes that others can solve.
welcome.feature1Description: Click on the grid to add cells and build your puzzle shape. Click existing cells to remove them.
welcome.feature2Description: Drag to rotate the view and examine your puzzle from all angles as you build.
welcome.feature3Description: Use the camera controls to see how your puzzle will look from different perspectives.
welcome.feature4Description: Save your creation to your account and give it a name and description.
welcome.feature5Description: Publish your puzzle so others around the world can solve your unique design.

infoHub.title: Information & Help
infoHub.subtitle: Choose a topic to learn more

modeModal.ratedDescription: Rated mode tracks your score and challenges you to solve efficiently.
modeModal.ratedRule2: Using hints places the piece but awards no point (net 0)
modeModal.ratedRule4: Undo is restricted to last move only
modeModal.ratedStrategy: Strategy: This competitive mode rewards planning and efficient solving!
modeModal.unratedDescription: Unrated mode is perfect for exploration and learning without pressure.
modeModal.unratedTip: Relax and explore: This mode is designed for practice and discovery!

puzzleModal.title: About This Puzzle
puzzleModal.creator: Creator
puzzleModal.roughSearchSpace: Rough search space on the order of

controlsModal.title: How to Solve
controlsModal.intro: In manual mode you draw each Koos piece directly on the lattice.
controlsModal.drawPiece: Double-click adjacent empty cells to draw up to 4 spheres
controlsModal.cancelDrawing: Single-click on a cell to cancel the current drawing
controlsModal.selectPiece: Click a placed piece to select it
controlsModal.deletePiece: Double-click or long-press a selected piece to delete it
controlsModal.undoRedo: Use Ctrl+Z / ⌘Z to undo and Shift+Ctrl+Z / Shift+⌘Z to redo
controlsModal.modeUnique: Place each piece at most once
controlsModal.modeUnlimited: Use any piece as many times as you like
controlsModal.modeIdentical: The first piece you place becomes the only allowed piece
controlsModal.tipDescription: Use the gear icon (⚙️) to tune lighting and materials so the structure is easier to read while you explore

playInfoHub.title: Game Information
playInfoHub.subtitle: Choose a topic to learn more

howToPlayModal.title: How to Play
howToPlayModal.intro: Compete against the computer in turn-based puzzle assembly. Take turns placing pieces and try to outscore your opponent.

turnBased.title: Turns
turnBased.description: You and the computer take turns placing one piece at a time. A piece is shown on the board immediately, then the system checks if the puzzle is still solvable.

placing.title: How to Place a Piece
placing.step1: On your turn, draw up to 4 connected empty cells to form a piece shape.
placing.step2: The system identifies the matching piece and places it.

scoring.title: Valid vs Invalid Moves
scoring.validPlacement: Valid move: The piece stays, and you earn +1 point.
scoring.invalidPlacement: Invalid move: If the placement makes the puzzle unsolvable, the piece is removed with a short fade-out, you earn 0 points, and the turn passes.

hints.title: Solvability Indicator
hints.description: 🟢 Green: Puzzle is solvable | 🟠 Orange: Solvability unknown (still allowed) | 🔴 Red: This move is rejected and will be undone

visibility.title: Winning
visibility.description: The game ends only when the board is completely filled. The player with the higher score wins.

autoSolveInfoHub.title: Auto Solve Information
autoSolveInfoHub.subtitle: Choose a topic to learn more

howToModal.title: How to Auto Solve
howToModal.intro: Let the computer find solutions automatically using advanced search algorithms!

whatItDoes.title: What Auto Solve Does
whatItDoes.description: The computer attempts to find a valid solution by systematically exploring possible piece placements. This process may take time depending on puzzle complexity.

strategies.title: Solution Strategies
strategies.exhaustive: Exhaustive: Explores all possibilities thoroughly for guaranteed solutions
strategies.balanced: Balanced: Uses smart heuristics to find solutions efficiently
strategies.fast: Fast: Prioritizes speed with randomized search techniques

timeComplexity.title: Time & Complexity
timeComplexity.description: Solution time varies greatly based on puzzle size, piece count, and container constraints.
timeComplexity.factors: Larger search spaces may require minutes or longer. The solver will report progress and intermediate states.

controls.title: Controls
controls.start: Start: Begin the automated solving process
controls.stop: Stop: Halt the current solve attempt
controls.reveal: Reveal Slider: Show solution pieces incrementally
controls.explode: Explode Slider: Separate pieces to examine the structure

observation.title: Observation Mode
observation.description: Auto Solve is for observation, verification, and learning. Watch how the computer approaches the puzzle and learn from successful strategies.

verification.title: Solution Verification
verification.description: Use Auto Solve to verify that a puzzle you created is solvable, or to discover alternative solutions to known puzzles.

howToModal.tip: Complex puzzles may take longer to solve. Try different strategies if one doesn't find a solution quickly!

explanation.notYetDetermined: Solver has not yet determined solvability

matchmaking.noOpponents: No opponents available. Try again later.
matchmaking.randomDescription: A random opponent will be matched with you.
matchmaking.inviteDescription: Share the invite link with a friend to play together.

invite.title: Invite Link
invite.shareCode: Share this code with your opponent:
invite.validFor: The link stays good for 48 hours — you can close this page and come back later.

pending.title: You're in!
pending.hostAway: {{name}} isn't here right now — the match will start as soon as they return.
pending.nudgeMessage: I accepted your Koos Puzzle challenge — come play! {{link}}
pending.ended: This match is no longer available.
pending.endedHint: Your opponent may have cancelled the game.

resume.pending: You have a pending match on {{puzzle}}

challengeChoice.title: Challenge a friend
challengeChoice.liveDesc: A real-time match — send an invite link and play together.
challengeChoice.raceDesc: They race the ghost of your solve — anytime they like.
challengeChoice.raceReady: Your race link is ready — send it to a friend:
challengeChoice.raceShareMessage: Think you can beat me? Race my solve on Koos Puzzle! {{link}}
challengeChoice.noSolve: Solve this puzzle first to send a race.
challengeChoice.signInHint: Races need a saved solve — sign in first.

errors.mustBeLoggedIn: You must be logged in to play vs Player
errors.tooManyGames: You have 5 open games — finish one before starting a new one.
errors.notYourGame: This game belongs to other players.
errors.signInToResume: Sign in to return to this game

howToPlay.title: vs Player
howToPlay.description: Challenge another player in a turn-based puzzle duel.

join.expiredHint: The invite may have expired — ask for a new link.
join.signInToJoin: Sign in to join — we'll bring you straight back to the game.
join.guestPrompt: Pick a name and jump straight in — no account needed.
join.guestError: Couldn't set up a guest session — try again or sign in.

auth.needsAccount: Playing against another player needs an account.
auth.keepPlaying: You can keep playing vs Computer without an account.

chat.subtitleAI: Talk with your AI opponent while you play.
chat.aiOpener: Hey! I'm your AI chat companion for this PvP match 🎮. Chat with me while you play!
chat.blocked: Message not sent — please keep it friendly.
chat.slowDown: You're sending messages too quickly — take a short break.

timer.noneDesc: Play anytime — take turns at your own pace. The game waits for you both.
timer.timedDesc: A live match — each player has a chess clock.

challenge.invalidLink: This challenge link is invalid or has expired.
challenge.firstEver: {{name}} is the first ever to solve it
challenge.rules: You place every piece yourself · fewer hints wins · ties go to time

ghost.finishedTitle: Ghost finished — you can still win on placements

tutorial.ready: 🧩 You're ready — pick a real puzzle

step1.title: Lesson 1 · One Piece
step1.instruction: Tap 4 connected spheres to draw a piece. This board uses just ONE piece shape — place it twice. Stuck? Tap 💡 for a hint.
step1.praise: You just learned your first piece!

step2.title: Lesson 2 · Free Pieces
step2.instruction: Pieces come in many shapes — here you can use any of them, as often as you like. Fill the board with 3.
step2.praise: Three shapes, one solve — you're getting it.

step3.title: Lesson 3 · Classic
step3.instruction: The real puzzle: one of each piece only. Drag to rotate the board and fill it with 4 pieces.
step3.praise: A real Classic solve in 3D. You're ready.

shareClip.title: Share your solve
shareClip.chooseSubtitle: Post a video, or send a challenge link.
shareClip.videoSubtitle: Record a vertical clip for Instagram, TikTok or YouTube Shorts.
shareClip.sceneNotReady: Scene not ready yet — give it a moment.
shareClip.looksGoodShare: Looks good? Share it straight to your apps.
shareClip.looksGoodDownload: Looks good? Download the clip and post it.
shareClip.captionCopied: Caption copied — paste it when you post 📋
shareClip.dareThrone: I claimed this board first — take it from me.
shareClip.rankFirstEver: 🏆 First ever to solve this puzzle.

creationClip.title: Show off your creation
creationClip.subtitle: A vertical clip of {{name}} building itself — made for IG, TikTok and Shorts.
creationClip.preset3: Be the first to solve it
creationClip.caption: I just designed this puzzle 🧩 Be the first to solve it: {{url}}

install.title: Nice solve — keep it close
install.subtitle: Add Koos Puzzle to your home screen
install.iosIntro: Get the full-screen app with an icon on your home screen:
install.iosStep1: Tap the Share button ⎋ in Safari
install.body: One tap installs Koos Puzzle as an app — full screen, its own icon, ready for your next challenge.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.empty: No solves recorded yet for this puzzle.
leaderboard.beFirst: Be the first to solve it!
leaderboard.freeRanking: Ranked by fewest duplicate pieces, then score, then time.

challenges.emptyHint: Solve a puzzle and share the dare — it will appear here.

prototype.title: The Physical Puzzle
prototype.intro: The Koos Puzzle exists as working prototypes — glossy red, matte white, and brushed stainless steel, with a play tray that doubles as the lid of the piece storage case. Whether it goes into production depends on one thing: enough people saying they want one.
prototype.ctaBody: Register your interest — no commitment, no spam. If enough hands go up, it gets made, and you hear first.
prototype.thanks: You're on the list — thank you! You'll hear when there's news.
prototype.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

discovery.title: New discovery!
discovery.body: You're the first ever to find this exact solution — this puzzle now has {{n}} known solutions.
discovery.known: Known solution — this exact arrangement has been found before. Find a different one to claim a discovery!

contestsHub.bannerRush: Discovery rush: most new solutions by {{end}} wins {{prize}}
contestsHub.bannerRushNoEnd: Discovery rush: most new solutions wins {{prize}}
contestsHub.descRush: Save the most never-before-seen solutions to the target puzzle before the window closes.
contestsHub.descSpeed: Post the fastest solve of the target puzzle within the window.
contestsHub.descSpeedPalette: Post the fastest solve of the target puzzle within the window ({{palette}} pieces).
contestsHub.descPopularity: Create a puzzle during the window — the one that attracts the most distinct solvers wins, and its creator takes the prize.
contestsHub.minSolversNote: At least {{n}} distinct solvers are needed to qualify.
contestsHub.noneLive: No prize contests are live right now — check back soon.
contestsHub.promoLine: 🎉 Promotional event — play for the glory (no cash prize)
contestsHub.bannerSpeedPromo: ⏱ Speed trial promo live on this puzzle — fastest solve takes the crown
contestsHub.bannerRushPromo: 🔭 Discovery promo: most new solutions by {{end}} takes the crown
contestsHub.bannerRushPromoNoEnd: 🔭 Discovery promo live: most new solutions takes the crown

pieceMode.classicDesc: One of each piece — the real Koos puzzle.
pieceMode.freeDesc: Use any piece as often as you like.
pieceMode.singleDesc: Pick any set of pieces — solve the shape using only those.
pieceMode.rankedNote: Every mode has its own leaderboard — Classic is the main ranked board.
pieceMode.pickPiece: Choose one or more pieces to start.
pieceMode.notSolvable: This piece can't fill this shape
pieceMode.comboChecking: Checking if this combination can tile the shape…
pieceMode.comboUnknown: ⚠ Couldn't verify {{pieces}} in time — you can play, but solvability isn't guaranteed.
pieceMode.comboNotSolvable: ✗ {{pieces}} can't tile this shape — adjust your selection.

exploreClip.title: Share this puzzle
exploreClip.subtitle: A vertical clip of the solution building itself — send it with an invite to try the puzzle.
exploreClip.defaultMsg: This one's a beauty — give it a try…

palette.lockedTo: Challenge palette: {{label}} — you race with the same pieces.

explore.noStableOrder: ⚠️ This solution can’t be built piece-by-piece under gravity — some pieces would fall. Showing lowest-first instead of a build guide.

gameEnd.founderBodyClassic: First ever to solve this puzzle. The throne is yours until someone takes it.
gameEnd.founderBodyBoard: First ever on the {{label}} board. The throne is yours until someone takes it.
gameEnd.dareThrone: Dare someone to take your throne

thrones.title: Your thrones
thrones.openHint: No one has claimed these boards yet — the first solve founds the board.

ageGate.title: Prize eligibility
ageGate.body: Contest prizes require you to be 18 or older — or the age of majority in your jurisdiction, whichever is higher. Void where prohibited. Playing is never restricted; this only affects prize eligibility.
ageGate.checkbox: I confirm I meet this requirement

moderation.textNotAllowed: That text isn't allowed — please choose different wording.
moderation.usernameNotAllowed: That username isn't allowed — please pick another.
moderation.puzzleRateLimited: You're creating puzzles too fast — try again in a while.
moderation.solutionRateLimited: You're saving solutions too fast — take a short break and try again.
moderation.accountRequired: Please sign in with a full account to create puzzles.
moderation.solutionRejected: This solve couldn't be saved — its text wasn't allowed.

report.title: Report
report.rateLimited: You've sent several reports recently — please try again later.
report.failed: Couldn't send the report right now. Please try again.
